headline: Regulatory action against frontier models dominates the window as GPT-5.6 and Anthropic's Fable face bans and a federal recall.
body: Model regulation moved to the front of the window, with reports that GPT-5.6 and Anthropic's Fable were banned and that Fable and Mythos faced a federal recall, discussed at the Big Technology AI Summit alongside infrastructure buildout and US versus China competitive dynamics. Reviews of GPT-5.6 Sol, Terra, and Luna flagged mixed benchmarks and concerning cyber capabilities despite OpenAI's safety claims. Separately, technique breakouts clustered around system architecture and long-horizon planning, surfacing in a layered brand-voice approach and a system design framework. Tooling activity stayed steady across file handling, audio, and agent harnesses, with the TEN Framework targeting interruptible voice AI and Google Antigravity automating file organization.

cited_items.title: GPT 5.6 SOL: TBH, IT'S OKAY.. I have SERIOUS CONCERNS.
Automating workflows and file organization with Antigravity
